title: chamaecrista ipanorensis
intro: Chamaecrista ipanorensis, also known as Ipanema butterfly pea or butterfly pea, is a plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chamaecrista ipanorensis include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Chamaecrista ipanorensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
